title: stelis trichostoma
intro: Stelis trichostoma is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as an orchid. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Stelis trichostoma include its purported ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Stelis trichostoma often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
